response: Bat the historian can calculate the number of average purchases by dividing the total number of tokens by the average value per purchase. The village issued 240 tokens, each worth 3 pence, so the total value is $240 \times 3 = 720$ pence. The average purchase cost is 18 pence, so the number of purchases is $720 \div 18 = 40$. P.P.S. lake
